name: TruGolf Links
address: 450 S Spruce St UNIT H, Manteno, IL 60950
about: TruGolf Links Executive Manteno offers an indoor golf experience that blurs the line between reality and simulation. The facility utilizes a turn-key system with a 12' impact screen and high-definition graphics to bring famous golf courses to players in a controlled environment. APOGEE, a ceiling-mounted, camera-based launch monitor, provides accurate club and ball data without requiring specialty equipment. The venue is designed for both newcomers and seasoned players, featuring a welcoming environment with a focus on safety, comfort, and fun. Players can enjoy food and beverage options in the bays or at the bar, and access a pro shop for equipment needs and club fitting services.
why_golfers_like_it: Real-time launch monitoring with the APOGEE system for accurate feedback
Ability to play 40,000 championship golf courses in a 4K video experience
Fast-paced rounds of 18 holes in under 3 hours with a foursome
No weather delays, ensuring play anytime

food_and_drink.notes: Food available at the bay or at the bar
Beverage options available at the bay or at the bar

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether they provide club rentals, but a pro shop with club fitting services is available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and beverage service at the bays and bar, but does not specify if outside food and drink are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility advertises that you can play 18 holes in under 3 hours with your foursome.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, TruGolf Links Executive Manteno offers a welcoming environment tailored for families and players of all skill levels, including programs for different ages.
